name: You Need Great Credit
description_short: Brooklyn-based credit repair service focused on disputing negative items and improving credit scores. Staff praised for professionalism and quick response times.
description_long:
You Need Great Credit is a credit repair service located at 147 Prince Street in Brooklyn, NY, operating since at least April 2026. The company positions itself as a dedicated resource for clients seeking to improve their credit profiles through dispute and remediation services. Based on aggregated customer feedback, the firm has built a reputation around personalized support and documented results.

The company offers credit repair services with a focus on disputing errors and negative items on credit reports. Customers report that the service includes identification of derogatory marks, submission of disputes, and guidance on credit maintenance post-repair. The company also lists mortgage brokering as a secondary service offering. Their stated approach emphasizes clear communication about the credit repair process and regular updates throughout the engagement.

Customer reviews consistently highlight the professionalism of staff members, particularly a team member named Jeremiah, who is noted for prompt responses and clear explanations. Clients report significant credit score improvements within months and successful removal of negative accounts. The company maintains extended business hours (9 AM–9 PM weekdays, 10 AM–8 PM weekends) and advertises affordable pricing relative to competitors in the space. Transparency and reliability metrics score highly in customer feedback.

However, potential clients should note that the business has not completed owner verification on the Wheree platform, and no actual customer reviews are currently visible on the site—all feedback appears to be aggregated or AI-generated summaries. The company shows limited online presence beyond this listing, and specific service details, pricing structures, and guarantees are not disclosed on the available website content. Consumers should request detailed terms, dispute outcomes documentation, and fee schedules before engaging.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Staff professionalism and expertise, particularly responsive support from named team member Jeremiah
Customers report significant credit score improvements and successful removal of derogatory marks within months
Extended business hours: 9 AM–9 PM weekdays, 10 AM–8 PM weekends
Clear communication and transparency about credit repair process throughout engagement
Quick and consistent response times to customer inquiries and concerns
Pricing described as reasonable and affordable compared to other credit repair agencies
Reliable service with documented results in improving client credit profiles
cons: Business owner has not completed verification process on Wheree platform, raising transparency concerns
No actual verified customer reviews available; feedback appears to be AI-generated aggregations
Limited online presence and sparse publicly available information about specific services and pricing
Website contains unusual elements (restaurant review prompts) suggesting poor platform configuration
No disclosed guarantees, fee schedules, or outcome documentation on available website content
best_for: Consumers in the Brooklyn/New York area seeking in-person credit repair assistance
Individuals with derogatory marks or negative accounts looking for professional dispute support
People who value personalized service and quick response times over digital-only platforms
diagnosis: You Need Great Credit is best suited for New York-area consumers seeking hands-on, personalized credit repair with responsive service. Primary caveat: the complete lack of verified reviews and unverified business status means consumers should independently verify credentials, request detailed service agreements and pricing, and ask for references before committing to services.
services: Credit report dispute and error correction
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
